results.title: 7 Framer Alternatives for Marketing Teams and Fast-Growing Companies: 2026
results.content: # 7 Framer Alternatives for Marketing Teams and Fast-Growing Companies: 2026. Framer has built a strong reputation as a design-focused website builder with 260,000+ websites created on its platform. This guide examines seven Framer alternatives, starting with Flint, the AI-powered landing page platform built specifically for marketing velocity and GTM execution. * **Speed matters for marketing teams**: Flint generates production-ready landing pages in minutes while Framer requires 30+ minutes of manual design work per page, making Flint the clear choice for teams running multiple campaigns simultaneously. * **Brand consistency without design expertise**: Flint's proprietary brand extraction technology automatically captures your design system from your existing website, while traditional builders like Framer and Webflow require manual recreation of brand elements. * **GTM tool integration separates platforms**: Only Flint offers direct integration with Claude, Clay, and workflow automation tools through its MCP and API, enabling programmatic page creation from CRM data and ad platforms. Flint: AI-Powered Landing Pages for Marketing Teams.

results.title: 8 Framer Alternatives For Building A Website In 2026
results.content: 5. 8 Best Framer Alternatives to Try in 2026. We've curated a list of 8 best Framer alternatives to build your website using AI and compared them on features and pricing so you can find the right one. It's built for designers who want pixel-level control over how their site looks, moves, and responds, and it delivers on that promise. The visual editor is genuinely impressive, the animations are smooth, and sites built on Framer have fast load times. So, if you're one of them and you're looking for an alternative, you're at the right place. * Best for full design control: Webflow. * The learning curve is steep for non-designers: Framer's freeform canvas gives you a lot of control, but it assumes you know what to do with it. Where Framer expects you to arrive with a design vision and build it out manually, Butternut AI gives you a working starting point right away.
